params.value: SELECT CreatedById, COUNT(Id) oppCount FROM Opportunity WHERE CreatedDate = THIS_QUARTER AND Winback_Pilot__c > 0 AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND CreatedById IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) GROUP BY CreatedById
